name_en: 🆕 Haiyuan External Order【Real Owner】Dynamic Chip M13089 White & Color M12925 Monogram. This All InBB Xph Handbag features Monogram canvas paired with glossy metalware, highlighting a classic style with a signature lock and nameplate. The adjustable shoulder strap continues the brand's trunk-making heritage, while the leather strap adds options for cross-body and shoulder carrying. The foldable design allows for flexible shape adjustment, offering ample space for daily use.
